message:
feat(fsqlite): expand public API integration tests, fix SOUNDEX NULL handling, and improve codegen

Major changes from concurrent agent work:

- builtins.rs: Fix SOUNDEX(NULL) to return NULL instead of "?000",
  matching SQLite reference behavior where SOUNDEX of a NULL input
  should propagate NULL rather than return a sentinel string.

- codegen.rs: Fix non-column expression emission in SELECT column
  reads. Previously, expressions like literals and placeholders in
  SELECT lists would incorrectly fall back to reading column 0;
  now they evaluate the expression directly via emit_expr().

- native_commit.rs: Replace panic!() with unreachable!() in test
  assertion for impossible match arm, better conveying intent that
  the arm genuinely cannot be reached rather than being an error.

- lib.rs: Add 346 lines of new public API integration tests covering
  compound WHERE predicates (AND, OR, NOT), comparison operators,
  NULL handling (IS NULL, IS NOT NULL, COALESCE, NULLIF), CASE WHEN
  expressions, built-in functions (ABS, LENGTH, UPPER, LOWER, TYPEOF),
  and more SQL patterns per bead bd-2832. Tests exercise the full
  stack from SQL parsing through codegen to execution.

- issues.jsonl: Track new bead bd-2832 for SQL pattern test coverage
  expansion, plus additional issue tracker updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
